title: ADCS Delegation Chain v0.1.0
description: Agent Delegation Chain Specification (ADCS) v0.1.0 — chain data structure recording the human at the root and every agent hop with intersected scopes, propagated budget, and runtime + type identity.

originSub.description: Stable identifier of the origin principal. MUST NOT change at any depth.

originClaims.description: The principal's identity claims at chain creation, preserved verbatim.

links.description: Ordered array of agent hops. links[0] is the first agent invoked by the origin principal.

depth.description: Number of links. MUST equal links.length.

vendorExtensions.description: Vendor-specific extension fields, namespaced to avoid collision with future ADCS revisions.

agentProfileId.description: Stable type identifier of the agent at this hop.

agentName.description: Human-readable identifier for dashboards and audit logs.

effectiveScopes.description: OAuth scopes this link is currently authorized to use. Result of intersectScopes.

effectiveTools.description: Tool identifiers this link is currently authorized to invoke. Result of intersectTools.

remainingBudgetCents.description: Non-negative integer remaining budget in cents. Result of computeChildBudget; decremented as the agent runs.

delegatedAt.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when this link was added.
